name: spruce22-plugins
description: A collection of useful Claude Code plugins for Product Managers and for parents.

plugins.name: funnypenny
plugins.description: Witty, high-integrity personal AI assistant. Markdown-only — no app, no server. Helps with to-do management, recipe voting, and grocery lists organized by store section. Funny, witty, clean, and high-integrity by default. Personal data lives at ~/.funnypenny/ and never enters this repo.
